note: empty array is truthy -> Node parses to [] (unknown); Rust has no tokens -> unknown; AGREE
batch of one request; Node array -> unknown (method/id undefined); Rust sees method+id -> request
batch of many requests; Node unknown; Rust method+id -> request, method=first token "a"
batch of notifications; Node unknown; Rust method T id F -> notification, method "n1"
batch of responses; Node unknown; Rust method F id T error F -> response
batch of errors; Node unknown; Rust method F id T error T -> error
mixed batch; Node unknown; Rust method+id present -> request, method=first "req"
response+error mix, no method anywhere; Node unknown; Rust method F id T error T -> error
notif+response; Node unknown; Rust method T id T -> request (method beats response), method "n"
array of empty objects; Node unknown; Rust no tokens -> unknown; AGREE
array of plain numbers; Node array -> unknown; Rust no tokens -> unknown; AGREE
array of strings, no classifier tokens; Node unknown; Rust unknown; AGREE
nested empty arrays; Node array -> unknown; Rust no tokens -> unknown; AGREE
request nested inside inner array; Node outer array -> unknown; Rust sees method+id -> request, method "deep"
ids in nested arrays, no method/error; Node unknown; Rust method F id T error F -> response
only id keys; Node unknown; Rust method F id T error F -> response
only error keys, no id/method; Node unknown; Rust method F id F error T -> error
only method, single elem; Node unknown; Rust method T id F -> notification, method "m"
value EQUAL to method supplies "method" token via closing quote; Node unknown; Rust method T id T -> request
escaped \"method\" in value lacks token (trailing backslash); Node unknown; Rust method F id T error F -> response
unicode-escaped method in batch; Node unknown (method null); Rust request, method KEPT verbatim \u65e5\u672c
unterminated array (no closing bracket); Node JSON.parse throws -> unparsed; Rust still sees method+id -> request
trailing comma invalid JSON -> Node unparsed; Rust method F id T error F -> response
array of nulls (parses to truthy array); Node unknown; Rust no tokens -> unknown; AGREE
whitespace-padded batch request; Node array -> unknown; Rust tokens "method"+"id" present despite spaces -> request, method "a"
